name: @fintech-portfolio/contracts
description: Documented API contract types (GraphQL schema + generated operation types, per TDR-CW-WEB-001 > technology_decisions.api_style_and_graphql_client), implemented directly by the mock service layer. No consumer-driven contract testing tool (Pact rejected platform-wide, ADR-006) — see TDR-PLATFORM-001 > technology_decisions.shared_mock_backend_strategy.contract_testing.

metadata.scope: API contract types only — request/response DTO shapes, status codes, error formats. No hand-written runtime logic (safely regenerable from a schema in principle); shared domain logic that operationalizes these shapes (e.g. Money's toMajorUnits conversion) lives in libs/util/money instead, so this package stays pure types.
metadata.graphql_codegen_convention: Once a GraphQL schema exists (see TDR-CW-WEB-001 > mock_backend_architecture.schema_and_codegen), its GraphQL Code Generator output belongs in src/generated/ — committed to git, produced by a "generate" script, and kept separate from hand-written types like src/money.ts, so neither needs untangling from the other later. Not yet implemented: no schema exists yet.
